title: Policy: Policy applied - Turn off WiFi
scenario: Policy-locked settings remain locked and show offline modification pop-up after app restart when Wi-Fi is turned off
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to Home screen and ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
3. Apply a Policy to the device (e.g., lock ANC, Transparency Mode, or Equalizer settings) via the Policy management system.
4. Turn off Wi-Fi on the Android device.
5. Force close and restart the Poly Studio Mobile app.
6. Navigate to Poly Studio Mobile → [Device Name] → Audio Settings.
7. Attempt to modify a setting that is locked by the Policy (e.g., toggle ANC, change Equalizer preset).
8. Observe the app behavior when attempting to change the locked setting.
expected: The locked setting should remain unmodifiable. A pop-up message should appear indicating that the setting cannot be modified offline.
